translation_quality.summary: Translation is solid but leaves English title 'Golden Age of Quidditch' untranslated. 'Kẻ cuồng tín máu thuần chủng' for 'blood purists' is a semantic error — 'cuồng tín' means 'fanatic' not 'purist'. Some English terms retained.

findings.issue: Chapter section title remains in English instead of Vietnamese.
findings.suggested_fix: Translate to 'Kỷ Nguyên Vàng của Quidditch' or similar.

findings.target_excerpt: kẻ cuồng tín máu thuần chủng
findings.issue: 'Cuồng tín' means 'fanatic' — 'purists' implies someone who believes in racial purity (blood purity) but is not necessarily a fanatic. The translation over-translates the intensity.
findings.suggested_fix: Consider 'kẻ theo chủng thuần' or 'những kẻ bảo thủ máu' to better capture 'purist' without the fanatic connotation.

findings.issue: Some English terms/organization names remain in English. May be intentional for proper nouns.
findings.suggested_fix: Verify if retention is intentional or needs translation per glossary.

notes: Overall good quality with a few polish issues. The 'blood purists' translation is the main accuracy concern.
